CustomField.description: Canonical code for this geography — e.g. IATA airport/city code (ATL, JFK, LHR), ISO country code (US, GB), or a region/group code (US50, EMEAI, DL-KE-JV). Unique external ID; drives SFDMU upsert matching and single-field self-referential parent resolution.
CustomField.label: Code
